channel.title: Primary Technology
channel.description: Tech news that matters for everyone to understand. Our hosts break down the most important stories, from consumer tech and gadgets, to AI and beyond. Stephen Robles is a content creator with over 150K on YouTube, and Jason Aten is a technology columnist at Inc.com having written in the past for Business Insider and The Chicago Tribune. Tune in every Thursday for new episodes.

item.title: Making the Best iPhone Camera App with Ben Sandofsky from Halide
item.itunes:title: Making the Best iPhone Camera App with Ben Sandofsky from Halide
item.description:
Get an exclusive look at the new Halide Mark III app with developer Ben Sandofsky from Lux.camera! Plus, we discuss AI in photography, C2PA, and the camera used on the moon.

  • Watch this episode on YouTube here!

item.title: Is Apple’s Exodus Over? Australia Bans Social Media for Kids, Netflix to Buy Warner Bros.
item.itunes:title: Is Apple’s Exodus Over? Australia Bans Social Media for Kids, Netflix to Buy Warner Bros.
item.description:
Apple Silicon’s Johny Srouji says he’s staying, Australia enforces a sweeping social media ban for kids, Netflix makes a massive $72 billion gamble against YouTube, ChatGPT can use Photoshop for you, and Meta gives you some control over its algorithm.

item.itunes:title: Is Tim Cook Holding Apple Back? Faster MagSafe Coming, iPhone 17 Colors Leak, Google Pixel 10 Event
item.description:
Tim Cook may be CEO of Apple for years to come, but is the 'Tim Cook Doctrine' hurting Apple’s progress? Does Apple need a “product” focused CEO, and what does that even mean? Plus Qi2.2 devices announced, Pixel 10 event scheduled, iPhone 17 colors leaks, Belkin is out of the smart home business, and our food tracking app of choice.

item.itunes:title: Apple May Ditch Siri AI, Nothing Headphone (1) + Phone (3), Grammarly AI Work Suite

item.itunes:title: John Gruber on AI Replacing iPhone in 10 Years, Google vs AI Search in Safari, and Siri at WWDC
item.description:
Special guest John Gruber joins us to break down Eddy Cue’s statements on AI replacing the iPhone in 10 years, using AI search in Safari, Apple’s continued fight for App Store control, and what we’ll hear about Siri and Apple Intelligence at WWDC 2025.

  • Bonus Episode: John Gruber on iPhone battery percentage, macOS Dock placement, and most importantly, Pencil direction. Listen here!

item.itunes:title: ‘Hot Tub’ Explicit iPhone App Hits EU, Apple's New Invites App, Sonos Making a Streaming Box

item.title: DeepSeek Explained, AI Arms Race, iOS 18.3 Updates, Rube Goldberg Email Machine
item.itunes:title: DeepSeek Explained, AI Arms Race, iOS 18.3 Updates, Rube Goldberg Email Machine
item.description:
We unravel everything you need to know about DeepSeek, the Chinese AI starup and how it’s affecting OpenAI, Meta, and more, plus new features came with iOS 18.3, iPhone SE 4 might finally do away with the home button, and we dive into the Rube Goldberg machine of how we manage email.

Sponsored by Notion AI

  • Organize your work and life using Notion AI. Try Notion for free when you go to: notion.com/primarytechnology


Get Primary Tech Show Merch!

item.title: TikTok: There and Back Again, iOS 18.3 Apple Intelligence by Default, Galaxy S25 Edge
item.itunes:title: TikTok: There and Back Again, iOS 18.3 Apple Intelligence by Default, Galaxy S25 Edge
item.description:
The TikTok ban saga is bizarre, but we tease out the details, the unexpected reprieve from Trump, and what it means going forward. Plus, iOS 18.3 temporarily removes a key feature, Apple Intelligence is on by default, and the new Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge may usher in the era of thin phones.

Sponsored by:

HelloFresh: Get up to 10 FREE meals and a free high protein item for life when you go to: hellofresh.com/primary10fm

Watch on YouTube!

  • Subscribe and watch our weekly episodes plus bonus clips at: youtube.com/@primarytechshow

Join the Community

  • Discuss new episodes, start your own conversation, and join the Primary Tech community here: social.primarytech.fm

Support the show

  • Join our member community and get an ad-free versions of the show, plus exclusive bonus episodes every week! Subscribe directly in Apple Podcasts or here: primarytech.memberful.com/join

  • @jasonaten on Threads
  • @JasonAten on X

Those interested in sponsoring the show can reach out to us at: podcast@primarytech.fm

item.title: OpenAI to Release Sora, The Verge Adds a Paywall, and the Future of Online Content
item.itunes:title: OpenAI to Release Sora, The Verge Adds a Paywall, and the Future of Online Content
item.description:
OpenAI announced 12 days of “shipmas,” likely to include Sora video generator, a new reasoning model, and more; The Verge adds a paid subscription which leads to an existential crises about the future of online content; Google DeepMind creates interactive game-like worlds from a single image; FBI ironically recommends encrypted Messaging apps; and Stephen needs help planning an EV road trip.

item.itunes:title: Apple Unveils M4 Mac Mini, New iMac, M4 Max MacBook Pro, and iOS 18.2 Image Playgrounds is Terrifying

Apple releases the new M4 iMac, completely redesigned M4 Mac mini, and new M4 Pro + M4 Max MacBook Pros with a nano-texture display option. Plus, we explore iOS 18.2 beta with Image Playgrounds, Netflix Moments allow users to share clips of movies and shows, tech earnings driven by AI, and Stephen bricks his iPad Pro.

item.title: Google is a ‘Monopolist’ Judge Rules, Apple Search Engine Play, X is Grasping at Straws
item.itunes:title: Google is a ‘Monopolist’ Judge Rules, Apple Search Engine Play, X is Grasping at Straws
item.description:
We explore Apple's record-breaking quarterly results and increasing services revenue, a judge's ruling on Google as a monopolist in US antitrust case, Apple is definitely making a search engine, X CEO Linda Yaccarino promises to sue advertisers for boycotting the platform, iOS 18 beta reveals a Thanos snap feature for ads, and Google kills yet another product.

item.title: What Exactly Is Friend AI? Interview with Adam Lisagor and Kailee McGee
item.itunes:title: What Exactly Is Friend AI? Interview with Adam Lisagor and Kailee McGee
item.description:
After getting burned by Humane’s Ai Pin and Rabbit R1, we’ve been skeptical of AI gadgets. But a new device called Friend entered the chat, so we interviewed Adam Lisagor of Sandwich Video and “Friend” trailer director Kaylee McGee about their first hand experience with this new type of AI wearable. We get pretty philosophical too, like free will kind of stuff.

item.itunes:title: Apple Intelligence Not Coming to EU, RCS Live in iOS 18 Beta, Official Olympic Recaps with AI Voice
item.description:
The latest beta of iOS 18 officially brings RCS support to iPhone, Apple Intelligence won’t be coming to Europe due to the DMA, EU sues Apple and Microsoft, some nostalgia for Skype, and the AI version of Al Michaels we offer Olympic recaps on Peacock.

Watch on YouTube!

  • Subscribe and watch our weekly episodes plus bonus clips at: https://youtu.be/pTHBu9Md5Mc

item.title: Perplexity AI is BS’ing Everyone, Which Mac is Best For Me? visionOS 2.0 is Worth the Beta
item.itunes:title: Perplexity AI is BS’ing Everyone, Which Mac is Best For Me? visionOS 2.0 is Worth the Beta
item.description:

item.itunes:title: iPhone Parental Control Failure, WWDC Community Wishlist, Sonos Ace Review, Apple + OpenAI Deal
item.description:
Apple had a serious flaw in its Screen Time parental controls for years, Nvidia surpasses Apple's market value, partnership between Apple and OpenAI imminent, and our community’s WWDC wishlist!

Try Setapp Today!


Get incredible apps like Downie, CleanShotX, Ulysses, Paste, and more all with one monthly subscription of $10 at setapp.com < click that link and Primary Tech will earn a small commission when you sign up!

item.title: WWDC iOS 18 and Siri Wishlist, News Outlets Make OpenAI Deal, 1,000s of Google Search Documents Leak
item.itunes:title: WWDC iOS 18 and Siri Wishlist, News Outlets Make OpenAI Deal, 1,000s of Google Search Documents Leak
item.description:
Apple WWDC press invites go out and we run down our wishlist for all things iOS 18, Siri, and more! Plus, new licensing deals between The Atlantic, Vox Media, and OpenAI, and Google confirms the authenticity of thousands of leaked Search API documents.

Watch on YouTube!

  • Subscribe and watch our weekly episodes plus bonus clips at: youtube.com/@primarytechshow

Join the Community

  • Discuss new episodes, start your own conversation, and join the Primary Tech community here: social.primarytech.fm

Support the show

  • Join our member community and get an ad-free versions of the show, plus exclusive bonus episodes every week! Subscribe directly in Apple Podcasts or here: primarytech.memberful.com/join

Reach out:

  • Stephen's YouTube Channel
  • @stephenrobles on Threads
  • @stephenrobles on X
  • Stephen on Mastodon
  • Jason's Inc.com Articles
  • @jasonaten on Threads
  • @JasonAten on X
  • Jason on Mastodon

We would also appreciate a 5-star rating and review in Apple Podcasts and Spotify

Podcast artwork with help from Basic Apple Guy.


Those interested in sponsoring the show can reach out to us at: podcast@primarytech.fm


Links from the show

  • Apple’s Worldwide Developers Conference to kick off June 10 with Keynote address - Apple
  • Stephen's Kino App Video
  • Stephen's What If... App Video
  • Atlantic, Vox Media ink licensing, product deals with OpenAI
  • Google confirms the leaked Search documents are real - The Verge
  • An Anonymous Source Shared Thousands of Leaked Google Search API Documents with Me; Everyone in SEO Should See Them - SparkToro
  • Google AI said to put glue in pizza — so I made a pizza with glue and ate it
  • MKBHD Videos on iPhone Durability
  • Apple (AAPL) Signals That It’s Working on TV+ App for Android Phones - Bloomberg
  • Kino — Pro Video Camera for iPhone
  • Apple apologizes for iPad Pro ‘Crush’ ad: it ‘missed the mark’ | Ad Age
  • WWDC 2023 - YouTube

item.title: Microsoft Reignites Mac vs PC War, Scarlett Johansson + OpenAI Controversy, iPhone Badge Hygiene
item.itunes:title: Microsoft Reignites Mac vs PC War, Scarlett Johansson + OpenAI Controversy, iPhone Badge Hygiene
item.description:
Microsoft announced new Copilot+PCs with AI features like Recall that keeps record of everything you see, Scarlett Johansson takes on OpenAI for an eerily similar voice to Her, Apple's potential OpenAI integration, new Sonos Ace headphones officially announced, and Stephen shares some…thoughts on Apple Podcasts.

item.title: M4 iPad Pro Hands-On, ChatGPT-4o vs. Google AI Arms Race, “I Liked the Internet”
item.itunes:title: M4 iPad Pro Hands-On, ChatGPT-4o vs. Google AI Arms Race, “I Liked the Internet”
item.description:
We go hands-on with Apple's M4 iPad Pro and why it may be the perfect iPad, OpenAI releases GPT-4o as it races against Google Gemini, Apple announces incredible new accessibility features, and Jason tries to convince Stephen he’s using Apple Pencil wrong.

Watch on YouTube!
